name: vscode-pandoc-citation-preview
description: Render Pandoc-style citations (@key, [@key]) in VS Code Markdown Preview

pandocCitationPreview.enabled.description: Enable or disable the Pandoc Citation Preview extension for the current workspace.

pandocCitationPreview.defaultCsl.description: Default CSL style name (e.g. "ieee") or file path. Used when no CSL is specified in YAML frontmatter.

pandocCitationPreview.defaultBibliograph.description: Default bibliography file paths. These are loaded in addition to any files specified in YAML frontmatter.

pandocCitationPreview.searchDirectories.description: Directories to search when resolving bibliography file paths.

pandocCitationPreview.cslSearchDirectori.description: Directories to search when resolving CSL style file paths.

pandocCitationPreview.locale.description: Locale for citation rendering (e.g. "en-US", "ja-JP", "de-DE"). Empty string uses the default (en-US).

pandocCitationPreview.popoverEnabled.description: Enable citation popover tooltips in the Markdown preview. When disabled, citations render as plain text without hover popover elements.
